roleData.title: AI in Education Research Intern
roleData.description:
- Built Lumina, a real-time classroom analytics platform using face/pose vision for attendance, attention, and cheating detection; powered by Ant Design Vue, Spring Boot, and TensorRT-accelerated C++/Drogon inference servers.
- Implemented vision pipelines for facial recognition, emotion analysis, and suspicious behavior detection (object passing), with FFmpeg processing, MySQL/Redis storage, MinIO snapshots, and live monitoring.

roleData.title: Part-time Web Developer
roleData.description:
- Supported maintenance of CarpoolNU, NEU’s ride-sharing app, with vulnerability checks and authentication updates.
- Reviewed and optimized the carpool matching algorithm for more accurate and efficient user matches.
- Built an administration portal for account management, permissions, and carpool cycle operations.

roleData.title: Agricultural IOT Student Intern
roleData.description:
- Built Greenward, an agriculture platform that unified IoT devices, farm operations, and traceability into a web system.
- Developed backend using Spring Boot, MyBatis, MySQL, Redis, and Netty to enable integration of heterogeneous devices via MQTT, TCP, Modbus, RS485, and GB28181 video streaming, and integrated a Neo4j knowledge graph to model crop-land-climate-equipment relationships, enabling graph-based search and  data linkage.

roleData.title: AI in Education Research Intern
roleData.description:
- Designed community-of-practice workshops for Bay Area teachers on efficient and safe LLM use.
- Analyzed LLM response bias and classroom ethics, benchmarked prompts across models and presented mitigation strategies for instruction.

roleData.title: Teaching Assistant - CS3520 Programming in C++
roleData.description:
- Assisted in teaching core C++ concepts, including memory management, object-oriented programming, and debugging.
- Held weekly office hours and supported over 80 students through Piazza, email, and live sessions.

roleData.title: STEM Literacy Volunteer
roleData.description:
- Helped middle school students in preparation for the Boston Public Schools Science Fair. 
- Supported students research in STEM areas such as Data Science and Environmental Science, and writing technical reports and essays.
